name: Leaflock
text: Cannot have restricted attachments. Leaflock gets –1 threat cost for each Ent hero you control. Response: After a hero you control suffers non-combat damage, heal 1 damage from it. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Thorin Oakenshield
text: Setup: Search your deck for King Under the Mountain and attach it to Thorin Oakenshield. Shuffle your deck. Response: When Thorin Oakenshield is destroyed while King Under the Mountain is attached, add him to the victory display and attach King under the Mountain to a different eligible hero. While Thorin Oakenshield is in the victory display, the hero with King Under the Mountain attached gains 2 additional resources during the resource phase.

name: Fighting Knives
text: Attach to a hero with ranged. Restricted. Attached hero gets +1 [attack]. While attacking an enemy engaged with you, attached hero gets +1 [attack].

name: Company Scout
text: Company Scout gets +1 [willpower] for each [tactics] hero you control that is not committed to the quest.

name: Brothers in Arms
text: Limit 1 per player. Attach to 2 heroes you control. (Place it between them, with 1 hero on the left and 1 hero on the right. If either hero leaves play, discard this attachment.) Attached hero on the left gets +1 [defense]. Attached hero on the right gets +1 [attack]. Response: After an attached hero exhausts, exhaust Brothers in Arms to ready another attached hero.

name: Sam Gamgee
text: While you control a unique Noldor character, Sam Gamgee gains the Noldor trait. Response: After Sam Gamgee quests successfully, search the top 5 cards of your deck for an ally that shares a Trait with Sam Gamgee and put it into play. At the end of the round, if that ally is still in play, add it to your hand.

name: The Lonely Mountain
text: Play only if you control a Dwarf hero or Bilbo Baggins. Attach to a [lore] hero. Limit 1 per hero. Attached hero gets +1 [defense] (+2 [defense] instead if you control at least 5 Dwarf characters).

name: The Brown
text: Action: Either attach The Brown to Radagast, or spend 3 resources to search your deck for Radagast, put him into play, attach The Brown to him, and shuffle your deck. Counts as a Title attachment with the text: “Action: Move a resource from Radagast’s pool to an Istari or Creature hero’s pool.”

name: Secrets of the Naith
text: Planning Action: Search the top 10 cards of your deck for an event card with a printed cost of X or less and add it to your hand (2 event cards instead if you control a Silvan hero). Shuffle your deck.

name: Shathûr Surveyor
text: Action: Exhaust Shathûr Surveyor to shuffle your deck and look at the top 3 cards. Put those cards back on the top of your deck in any order.

name: Loose Boulders
text: Response: When Loose Boulders is discarded from your deck, if you have not played a copy of it this round, you may play it as if it were in your hand. Action: Deal 1 damage to an enemy in the staging area. Shuffle Loose Boulders into your deck.

name: Delving Greedily
text: Attach to a Dwarf hero. Forced: If Delving Greedily is discarded from the top of your deck, shuffle Delving Greedily back into your deck and reveal an encounter card. Response: After you discard any number of cards from the top of your deck, exhaust Delving Greedily to add one of those cards to your hand.

name: Creep Along Quietly
text: Combat Action: Exhaust a Scout or Hobbit character you control with X [willpower] to choose an enemy engaged with you that has [threat] equal to or less than X. Chosen enemy does not attack you this round.

name: Honour of Dwarves
text: Attach to a character. Attached character gains the Dwarf trait.

name: Fire of Orthanc
text: Play only if you control an Istari hero. Action: Exhaust an ally and choose a location. Place X progress on that location. X is the tens digit of your threat.

name: Aragorn
text: Aragorn has the hero card type in addition to his ally card type, but does not collect resources during the resource phase. Response: After Aragorn enters play, search your collection for an Artifact card and attach it to Aragorn.

name: The White
text: Attach to an Istari character in play or in your discard pile. If attached to the latter, put it into play under your control. Allies that share a Trait with a hero you control get +1 [defense] and +1 hit point.

name: Nalir
text: Response: After you raise your threat from another player card effect, reduce your threat by 1. (Limit once per phase.) Forced: After you raise your threat from an encounter card effect, raise your threat by 1. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Anor Stone
text: Setup: Each player may freely opt in. Flip this card over.

name: Anor Stone
text: Other player card effects cannot discard encounter cards from play or cancel “when revealed” or shadow card effects. Cards in the encounter deck are immune to player card effects. Response: Exhaust Anor Stone to cancel the “when revealed” effects of a card that was just revealed from the encounter deck. Then, trigger doomed 2 and reveal another encounter card.

name: Sword that was Broken
text: Attach to a hero. Attached hero gains a [leadership] resource icon. If attached hero is Aragorn, Sword that was Broken gains: “Action: Exhaust Sword that was Broken to choose up to 3 characters. Each chosen character gets +1 [willpower] unitl the end of the round.”

name: Hungry Heron
text: Cannot be dealt shadow cards. While Hungry Heron is being attacked by a character with the ranged keyword, reduce Hungry Heron’s [defense] to 0. Forced: When a character is declared as defender against Hungry Heron, deal 1 damage to that character.

name: Dwarven Constitution 1
text: Attach to a Dwarf character. Limit 1 per character. Action: Exhaust Dwarven Constitution 1 to heal one damage from attached character. Response: After Dwarven Constitution 1 is discarded from your deck, heal up to 2 damage from among Dwarf characters in play.

name: Dis
text: Response: Exhaust Dis to cancel 1 point of damage just dealt to a Dwarf character. Response: After a Dwarf hero is destroyed, discard Dis to put that hero back into play exhausted. (Limit once per game.)
